title: geum calthifolium var. rotundifolium
intro: Geum calthifolium var. rotundifolium, also known as the round-leaved avens, is a perennial plant in the rose family native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Geum calthifolium var. rotundifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
